name: Active/Athletic
description: Active lifestyle segment focused on fitness and physical activities
context: Active/Athletic segment values fitness, sports, outdoor activities, and physical health. They seek products that support active lifestyles.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through active-lifestyle lens. Values performance and durability.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on performance support, durability, fitness alignment, and active-lifestyle fit.
